title: [cross-impl] EDHOC Rust test uses prk_out as TH param in KDF assertion
description: In rust/lichen-oscore/src/edhoc.rs:1540 the test for prk_exporter does edhoc_kdf(&prk_out, &prk_out, "10", &[], 32) with note "th param fixed to match signature". This differs from Python edhoc.py:465 (uses self._th_4) and C edhoc.c:981 (uses ctx->th_4). Previous commits (11d4a7a32, ed7ed668b) updated vectors but did not align algorithm. Violates test integrity (must use independent oracle, not code-under-test). Matches ccp16-hop.json pattern but breaks EDHOC consistency. See test/vectors/edhoc.json and spec/draft-lichen-schnorr-00.md Appendix A.
